name: California Check Cashing Stores
description_short: California Check Cashing Stores Sacramento, California — California Check Cashing Stores offers check cashing, payday loans up to $250, bill pay, money ...
description_long:
California Check Cashing Stores operates multiple locations across San Francisco, including branches on Mission Street and Market Street. The company has been established as a check-cashing and financial services provider, with a physical retail presence designed for walk-in customers needing immediate cash access and money services. Their San Francisco locations serve as neighborhood financial service hubs in areas like the Mission District.

The company's primary services include check cashing, payroll advances up to $250 available in-store and online, bill payment, tax preparation, Western Union money transfers and money orders, and Green Dot Visa debit card issuance. They also offer a payday loan application process requiring government-issued ID, proof of income, bank account verification, and Social Security number. Operating hours are 9 AM–7 PM weekdays and 10 AM–4 PM Saturday, with Sunday closures.

California Check Cashing distinguishes itself through multiple neighborhood locations for customer convenience, combined service offerings (check cashing plus lending), and online application options for payday advances alongside in-store service. They partner with Western Union and Green Dot to expand their service ecosystem, allowing customers to access money transfer, card services, and tax preparation under one roof.

The company operates within the check-cashing and payday lending space, which inherently carries high costs for consumers. Their website includes consumer notices acknowledging that small-dollar loans used long-term are expensive, and standard payday lending restrictions apply. Loan eligibility is based on underwriting criteria and ability to repay, meaning not all applicants qualify.
pros: Multiple San Francisco locations (at least 3 known branches) for neighborhood accessibility
Extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM) accommodate working customers
Payday advances available both in-store and online
Combined services including check cashing, bill pay, money orders, and tax prep at same location
Western Union money transfer and money order services available
Green Dot debit card issuance for unbanked/underbanked customers
Clear disclosure of loan costs and consumer protections on website
cons: Payday loan maximum of $250 is relatively low for emergency cash needs
No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on the website
Website lacks transparency on actual loan costs despite consumer warnings about expense
Loan eligibility based on underwriting criteria means many applicants will be denied
Sunday closures and limited Saturday hours (10 AM–4 PM) reduce access for some customers
best_for: Unbanked/underbanked San Francisco residents needing check cashing and immediate cash access
Workers seeking small payroll advances between paychecks
Customers needing multiple money services (wire transfers, money orders, bill pay) in one location
diagnosis: California Check Cashing Stores is best for San Francisco residents and workers who need quick access to check cashing, small emergency cash advances, or money transfer services and prefer in-person service at neighborhood locations. However, customers should be aware that payday loans and cash advances carry high costs when used repeatedly, and specific fee/APR details are not disclosed online—rates and terms should be reviewed in-store before applying.
services: Green Dot Visa debit card issuance
Customer support via email and phone
